product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya Marble Platter with Gold Leaf Inlay - Elegant Kitchen Serving Tray
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian homemakers, young professionals, gifting buyers
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Serving appetizers, snacks, and sweets in style
secondary_use_cases: Serving dry fruits and sweets during festivals
Elegant base for table décor during special occasions
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for Indian festivals like Diwali, weddings, housewarmings, and formal dinner gatherings

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Marble and gold embellishments resonate with Indian preferences for luxury and traditional art in home décor
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Used at home for hosting guests, during religious ceremonies, family gatherings, and festive occasions to serve sweets and savories
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Blends minimalistic luxury with traditional Indian hospitality aesthetics for premium kitchenware
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Symbolizes warmth, elegance, and pride in serving guests with quality, enhancing the joy of Indian celebrations

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Marble Platter with Gold Leaf Inlay – Elegant Serving Tray for Kitchen & Dining, Ideal for Indian Festivals and Gifting
bullet_points: Premium White Marble: Durable and smooth surface ideal for presenting snacks and sweets.
Gold Leaf Inlay Design: Adds a touch of opulence with traditional motifs enhancing festive table settings.
Multipurpose Serving Platter: Perfect for appetizers, dry fruits, and decorative use during celebrations.
Handcrafted Elegance: Each piece is crafted with attention to detail to complement Indian hospitality.
Ideal Gift Choice: Perfect for gifting on Diwali, weddings, housewarmings, and other cultural occasions.
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your serving experience with this Tatsya Marble Platter featuring exquisite gold leaf inlay. Ideal for Indian homes, it beautifully blends tradition and modern elegance, perfect for festive occasions and everyday hospitality.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Close-up visuals showing the smooth marble texture and intricate gold leaf inlay
Lifestyle images of the platter used during Diwali, family gatherings, and weddings
Story panel about the craftsmanship and cultural significance of marble and gold in Indian homes
Comparison chart highlighting durability and aesthetic benefits over plastic or metal trays
Gift packaging visuals emphasizing the platter as a premium Indian festival gift

long_tail_keywords: premium marble platter with gold leaf for Diwali
handcrafted serving tray for Indian festivals
luxury kitchen serving tray for weddings
decorative marble tray for Indian home

visual_improvements: Use clean, balanced minimalistic setups highlighting gold leaf detail
Showcase texture with natural lighting to emphasize marble purity
Integrate culturally relevant, elegant Indian dining settings
messaging_improvements: Emphasize handcrafted luxury tied to Indian hospitality
Focus on multipurpose festive and gifting versatility
Highlight durability and elegance in concise bullet points
lifestyle_positioning: Suggest usage during specific festivals and Indian ceremonies
Showcase the platter as part of curated, refined Indian home décor
Position as an ideal gifting and heirloom-quality item
trust_premium_perception: Promote Tatsya brand authenticity and craftsmanship
Highlight premium material sourcing and finishes
Create association with traditional Indian aesthetics blended with contemporary design

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Maintain exact shape, white marble color with natural grey veining, neat gold leaf inlay pattern consistent with image, no branding alterations.
recommended_image_angles: 45-degree angled close-up focusing on gold leaf design
Side profile showing platter thickness and edges
recommended_real_life_environments: Festive dining table setup with Indian sweets
Elegant living room side table with curated décor
indian_lifestyle_settings: Diwali or wedding pooja thali presentation
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Soft natural light or warm studio lighting enhancing marble texture and making gold leaf shimmer subtly, avoiding harsh shadows.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean white or softly textured neutral backgrounds with accent images on Indian cultural elegance, minimal text overlays complementing visuals.

suitable_backgrounds: Light wooden surface representing Indian kitchen aesthetics
Soft textured fabric in neutral tones for contrast
lifestyle_scenarios: Festive dinner table with diya lamps and sweets served on platter
Modern Indian home kitchen with fresh snacks served on platter
Gift wrapping presentation with rakhi or Diwali themes
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Avoid placing text on central product area; preferred placement on bottom or top margin space with clear contrast.
what_must_be_avoided: Artificial or unnatural colors on marble or gold
Reflective glare hiding gold leaf detail
